sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after LEFT
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Current state ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ('R', 'b', 'N', 'M'):
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if min(rows) < 50:
            center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
            center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
            print(f"Color={node['color']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, center=({center_r},{center_c})")

# Check bottom panel positions
print("\n=== Bottom panel ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ('R', 'b', 'N'):
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        if min(rows) >= 50:
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
            print(f"Color={node['color']}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, center_col={center_c}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
